steps.title: Use plain plural nouns
steps.content: The phrase needs to refer to multiple works and multiple writers. Because the phrase is of other writers, neither noun needs an apostrophe for possession.

steps.title: Remove false possessives
steps.content: Choice A makes both words possessive, Choice C makes work's possessive before of, and Choice D makes writer's singular possessive. The no-apostrophe form gives simple plurals. The answer is B.
